this was sent to us, i understand the  helicopter  remains unsold.  If you go to our website  www.yourjet.com  you will see we have sold a number of Sikorsky, in fact since December 4 new c++ and 5 used c+ and B.   Would be pleased to assist in the sale of 760677 if it holds any interest for you.   Bottom line is we get the  job done and know the Sikorsky market and are the world leader in resales of the product
 
Hope all else  is well with you personally.

    Airframe:
Time Since New:  Ferry Time only 
Total Cycles: Ferry Flight only 
Maintenance Program:    
Daniel's Systems Low Utilization
Maintenance Program
    
Baseline Avionics Package Includes: 
Collins Proline II - Dual Collins VHF 22A Comms and VIR 32 Navs, single ADF 462 ADF, TDR 90 Transponder, DME 42 DME with IND 42A Indicator, ALT 1000 Radio Altimeter with Expanded Scale ALI 55A Indicator.     
Honeywell EFIS/DAFCS - 4-Tube Honeywell EDZ 756 EFIS with 5" x 6" Indicators Displaying Airspeed, Altitude and Vertical Speed, Dual Litef AHRS, Dual Penny and Giles Air Data Computers, Dual Honeywell Digital SPZ 7600 Automatic Flight Control System, Altitude Alert.   
Electrical - 28 Volt Electrical System with two 200 Amp Starter/Generators, 10 KVA AC Generator, Dual Static Inverters, Avionics and EFIS Master Switches.  
Audio - Dual dB Systems Audio control panels with ICS and VOX plus three maintenance jacks, one in the cabin and two in the baggage compartment.  This also includes dual 45° pedestal mounted ICS foot switches, three David Clark Headsets, one six-foot walk-around cord and two 30-foot walk-around cords, Cabin PA/Chime System, and a Passenger Briefing System - PBS 250 
Backup/Safety Systems - Enhanced Ground Proximity Warning System, Universal 120 CVR, 3" Backup Airspeed Indicator and Altimeter, ADI-335D Standby Attitude Indicator with Nav1/Nav2 Select, ELT 406-NHM w/ Satellite Frequency, Electric Door Locks - Cabin, Cabin/Cockpit and FD DCPL Chime/Annunciator    
Weather Related Systems - Wx Avoidance Radar - Primus 440, Windshield Washer System, Heated Glass Windshields, and Engine Inlet Barrier Filter  
Helicopter Configuration:   
The following items of standard and optional equipment as described below, which have been selected by the Buyer, shall be installed on the Helicopter to be delivered under the Agreement.


Features of the S-76C++ Aircraft Code 0102


Dynamic System - Two Turbomeca Arriel 2S2 engines, and a four blade articulated main rotor system with dual controls.

Cockpit - An Integrated Instrument Display System (IIDS), with an easy to upgrade avionics package.  There is a Bleed Air Heating Defogging system and dual windshield wipers.  The Pilot and Copilot seats come with a five point Restraint system.

Cabin - A large cabin that can be configured for four different missions and a 38 cubic foot baggage compartment

Other - Retractable landing gear, and 281 gallons of usable fuel

Deluxe VIP Interior Package:    
Deluxe VIP interior package includes all items listed as Standard Equipment, 
plus the following:
    

*   Acoustic Treatment 
*   Air Outlets, Cabin 
*   Armrest Ledges 
*   Bulkhead, Cabin to Cockpit 
*   Carpet, Cabin/Cockpit 
*   Carpet, Spare 
*   Coat Hooks 
*   Color Selections 
*   Curtains, Bulkhead Widows 
*   Door Pulls, Cabin 

*   Drink Holders, Cabin 
*   Drink Holders, Cockpit 
*   Ducting, Heat/Vent 
*   Extension, Cushion Support 
*   Floor Runners 
*   Gear Pin Storage, Baggage 
*   Glare Shield, Cockpit 
*   Leather Trim, Cockpit 
*   Lights, Cabin

Honeywell EFIS/DAFCS - 4-Tube Honeywell EDZ 756 EFIS with 5" x 6" Indicators Displaying Airspeed, Altitude and Vertical Speed, Dual Litef AHRS, Dual Penny and Giles Air Data Computers, Dual Honeywell Digital SPZ 7600 Automatic Flight Control System, Altitude Alert.

Cabin – A large cabin that can be configured for four different missions and a 38 cubic foot baggage compartment
